verdict: PASSED — all hard checks pass. 1 soft finding: subtitle wrapping in Rubric/Metadata nodes (readable at viewer scale, below hard-fail threshold). Priority stack clearly communicates conflict-resolution direction. All 5 roles present with correct labels and color tiers.
